title: Details Update Mod
description: Details Update Mod aims to improve the gameplay by adding simple features which fit with the official game experience!
body:
## v1.3 - DETAILS UPDATE: HEAVY METAL
This third version of the mod is all about Iron and Copper Derivatives, as well as **Item Pipes** and new Redstone-Based Blocks! With these features you can finally build a new, and advanced storage system!

If you are not into technical adventures, don't worry, you can still have fun while building with the new **Cork Oak Wood** Set and other natural blocks and plants! 

This update features a new music disc: **Mechyl by Thaetaa-Terraainn**; found in Igloos and Stronghold Libraries, their track brings back the vibes of the very first attempt to build something with redstone.
In other words, puzzling and charming!

Read the full changelog with gameplay-explainations [here](https://details-update-mod.framer.wiki/changelogs/third-release)!

## ALONGSIDE THE GAME

This mod aims to improve the base vanilla gameplay of the official game, and it is compatible with Minecraft 1.21.8

#### Programmed in MCreator and designed in the spare time, this is a Made in Italy mod with no AI involved!
---
## CREDITS
- Spooky Wood textures were made by Iciclin!
- Sand, Red Sand and Gravel Path textures were made by [Manuel XXVI](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/manuel_xxvi/)!
- Glowing Obsidian texture was made by [blank3times](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/blank3times/)!
- Far Lands track was composed by [Steelman](https://youtu.be/x_nRlhcf58U?si=-Ny909GssV_Lcy54/)!
- Mechyl track was composed by [Thaetaa-Terraainn](https://www.youtube.com/@Thaetaa-Terraainn)!
#### Thanks to all of you to let me use your incredible works in this mod!
#### Music tracks were used according to their respective author's policies.
---
